raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes based on impact and risk", "rationale": "Fixing critical errors and high-impact issues first will maximize the benefit of autonomous work and minimize potential risks", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed fixes may lead to increased technical debt, security vulnerabilities, and decreased platform readiness", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on impact and risk
rationale: Fixing critical errors and high-impact issues first will maximize the benefit of autonomous work and minimize potential risks
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed fixes may lead to increased technical debt, security vulnerabilities, and decreased platform readiness
